name: Kochava Mobile Attribution API
what_it_does: Kochava REST API for mobile measurement and attribution platform. Enables AI agents to query install attribution data, retrieve campaign performance metrics, access audience intelligence, and integrate mobile measurement into marketing analytics. Kochava is known for privacy-first attribution and fraud detection capabilities.
use_cases: Querying mobile app install attribution and LTV data from marketing analytics agents
Retrieving campaign-level ROAS and performance data from growth optimization agents
Accessing audience segments and cohort analytics from product analytics agents
Integrating Kochava measurement data into marketing BI and reporting agents
not_for: Web-only analytics without mobile app measurement needs
Simple campaign tracking without MMP capabilities
best_when: A mobile app marketing team using Kochava wants AI agents to surface attribution insights, analyze channel performance, and integrate measurement data into growth and BI workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Mobile attribution data includes device IDs and behavioral signals. GDPR, CCPA, and Apple ATT compliance required. Kochava's privacy-first approach affects data availability.

auth.notes: Kochava API key authentication. API keys from Kochava dashboard per app. Account-scoped access for reporting APIs.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free for apps up to 1M MAU on basic plan
pricing.paid_tiers: Premium and Enterprise plans with advanced features
pricing.notes: Kochava offers a free tier. Enterprise pricing for large apps and advanced analytics.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits apply per API type; reporting APIs have separate quotas

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Mobile attribution data with device IDs — GDPR, CCPA, ATT compliance required
No public MCP server — REST API integration required
Privacy-first approach limits available data for opted-out users (ATT, GDPR) — expect nulls
Kochava reporting API is async for large datasets — poll for job completion
Rate limits vary by API type — verify for each reporting endpoint
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Mobile attribution data including device identifiers and behavioral data. GDPR, CCPA, Apple ATT compliance. SOC2. EU data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Mobile user behavioral data and device IDs. GDPR, CCPA, ATT compliance. SOC2. EU data residency.
